articles.description: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes speaks to club legend Wayne Rooney in a wide-ranging interview.

articles.title: Gianluca Prestianni banned for six matches by Uefa

articles.title: French Open: Carlos Alcaraz to miss Grand Slam title defence with wrist injury

articles.description: Mendoza is just third player in history to be a Heisman Trophy winner, a national champion and the first overall draft pick in the same year.
articles.title: NFL Draft 2026: Fernando Mendoza is first overall pick by Las Vegas Raiders

articles.description: The Turkish Grand Prix will return to the Formula 1 calendar in 2027 for the first time in six years.
articles.title: Turkish Grand Prix to return Formula 1 calendar in 2027

articles.description: Will it be Manchester City or Arsenal for the Premier League title? BBC Sport gets pundits, reporters and fans to predict each of their remaining fixtures - and who will win the league.
articles.title: Who will win Premier League title? The big prediction special

articles.description: Colombian rider Cristian Camilo Munoz dies from a knee infection following a crash six days ago.
articles.title: Cristian Camilo Munoz dies from knee infection six days after crash

articles.description: Michael Eneramo, who won 10 caps for the Super Eagles, dies aged 40 after suffering a suspected cardiac arrest during a friendly game.
articles.title: Michael Eneramo: Former Nigeria striker dies aged 40 during match

articles.description: Former New Zealand all-rounder Doug Bracewell has admitted using cocaine after the first day of Essex's final County Championship match last year.
articles.title: Doug Bracewell admits using cocaine after day's play in County Championship
